spec.name: Sound Filter Plane
spec.summary: Screens sound sonic flux as a planar spread at self reach, targeting the caster with immediate discharge by changing existing conditions.
spec.effect_description: Screens sound sonic flux as a planar spread at self reach, targeting the caster with immediate discharge by changing existing conditions.
